{%- set branding = bag('branding') -%}
{%- set host = branding['canonical_host'] -%}
{%- set talks = bag('talks')['talks'] -%}
# {{ site.config.PROJECT.name }} — full talks corpus

{{ branding['claim']['en'] }}.
{{ branding['dates']['conference'] }}, {{ branding['location']['venue'] }}, {{ branding['location']['city'] }}, Germany.

This file lists every confirmed talk with title, speakers, track, skill levels and abstract.
Plain text, no markup. Source: {{ host }}/talks/.

Total talks: {{ talks|length }}.

{% for talk in talks|sort(attribute='title') %}
---

## {{ talk.title }}

- URL: {{ host }}/talks/{{ talk.code }}/
- Speakers: {{ talk.speaker_names }}
- Track: {{ talk.track }}
- Type: {{ talk.submission_type_label or talk.submission_type or 'Talk' }}
{% if talk.python_skill %}- Python skill: {{ talk.python_skill }}{% endif %}
{% if talk.domain_expertise %}- Domain expertise: {{ talk.domain_expertise }}{% endif %}
{% if talk.day and talk.start_time %}- When: {{ talk.day }} {{ talk.start_time }}{% if talk.end_time %}-{{ talk.end_time }}{% endif %}{% endif %}
{% if talk.room %}- Room: {{ talk.room }}{% endif %}

{{ talk.abstract|striptags }}
{% endfor %}
